Title: 55 lbs. Mortar Mix
Body (HTML):
Rapid Set Mortar Mix is a high quality mortar that is suitable for vertical and overhead applications. It is ideal when rapid strength gain, high durability and low shrinkage are desired. Use Mortar Mix for general and structural concrete repair, stucco and plaster repair, 1-coat exterior plaster, mortar beds, underlayment and formed work. Mortar Mix sets in 15-minutes and is ready to drive or build on in 1-hours. Durable in wet environments, it can be applied from 1\2 in. to 6 in. thick. Mortar Mix is a blend of high performance Rapid Set cement with quality sand. Mortar Mix offers superior resistance to chemical attack. It is non-metallic and no chlorides are added. Mortar Mix allows the repair areas to be painted, coated or sealed quickly after application. Under dry conditions, water-based coatings such as latex paint can be applied after the product is hardened, which usually takes 1-hours to 4-hours. Solvent-based and impermeable coatings such as oil based paint and epoxy can be applied in 16-hours.

Title: 1,000 lbs. Capacity 4-in-1 Hand Truck
Body (HTML):
The versatile Milwaukee 4-in-1 Hand Truck easily converts to three operational positions. The hand truck will convert to a two-wheel vertical hand truck, an assisted 45 degree position, or a four wheel platform cart. Title: Stratford Feather-Light White 2 ft. x 4 ft. Lay-in Ceiling Panel (Case of 10)
Body (HTML):
Stratford White Feather-Light Ceiling Panels are unlike any ceiling tile you will ever see or feel. When you take them out of the box you will be surprised by the minimal weight of their Feather-Light construction. Ceilume Stratford panels are formed from a thin sheet of vinyl that is only 0.013 in. thick, about the thickness of a business card. But the Stratford's geometric design combined with the inherent strength of vinyl makes these tiles rigid, durable and easy to install. Their unique design tricks the eye into seeing 2 separate square tiles rather than one big 2 ft. x 4 ft. tile. The Stratford White Feather-Light Ceiling Panels are not at all like the old mineral fiber tiles you've used in the past and that's a good thing. They don't generate dust, they're unaffected by moisture, they don't harbor mold and they're easy to cut. Their white finish is bright, pure and easy to clean. Place them in your ceiling grid and you'll be thrilled by the way the Stratford improves the look of your room.
  • Made throughout from durable 0.013 in. thick white virgin vinyl material; these panels will not rust, stain, corrode or be affected by water
  • Designer beauty, only better! No special tools or skills required for installation
  • Impact resistant ceiling panels are 2 ft. x 4 ft. (actual size 23.75 in. x 47.75 in.) and each panel covers an 8 sq. ft. area
  • ASTM-E84 Class A fire rated, IAPMO UES ER-310 recognized compliant with 2006, 2009 and 2012 International Building Code and FDA compliant for food preparation areas
  • As a general rule, Ceilume Ceiling Tiles and Panels will not be affected by ceiling level temperatures up to 120 °F; in some installations involving halogen lights, metal heat registers, and radiant heat sources (wood stoves, kitchen ovens, etc.), localized ceiling and ceiling tile temperatures can be much higher than anticipated; please contact the manufacturer for specific advice if your installation has any of these special conditions
  • Excellent for remodeling or new construction, these elegant decorative ceiling panels trim easily with scissors or aviation snips for can light openings, etc
  • GREENGUARD Gold Certified for Indoor Air Quality and Children and Schools and fully recyclable
  • With styling that leaves mineral fiber ceiling panels in their own dust, Stratford's clean relief design makes it an icon in the ceiling industry
  • Each case contains 10 individual tiles that covers 80 sq. ft.
  • Light reflectance - 90.44%, NRC - 25%
  • Sample available from manufacturer upon request
  • Single tiles not returnable - returns only accepted in 10 tile increments
  • When 2 or more cases of this product are purchased, we will combine multiple cases into larger shipping boxes; so, you may receive fewer boxes than you were expecting
  • Return Policy

Quikrete 50 lbs. Q-5000 Concrete Mix consists of a commercial grade blend of Portland cement, sand, gravel. This concrete mix is designed for applications requiring high early strength and rapid strength gains. Quikrete 80 lbs. 5000 High Early Strength Concrete Mix has a walk on time of 10-hours to 12-hours. It is a perfect mix for both the DIY'er and contractor that are looking for a concrete with rapid strength gain.
  • Perfect for commercial applications at least 2 in. thick: footings, foundations, driveways and patios
  • Reaches 2500 psi in 3-days and 5000 psi in 28-days
  • Just add water
  • Exceeds specifications of C387 for high strength concrete mixes
  • Ideal for cold weather applications

It features large, comfortable platform steps that automatically lock into place. Title: ABA ZMAX Galvanized Adjustable Standoff Post Base for 6x6 Nominal Lumber
Body (HTML):
Post and column bases secure the bottom of posts or columns to concrete and are perfect for decks or patio covers. Models are available for attaching to existing hardened concrete, wet concrete, as well as wood. The AB series also offers adjustability around the anchor bolt to achieve optimum post placement. Many models provide a 1-in standoff from the concrete to help avoid post-end rot from moisture.
  • Attaches a post to existing concrete for decks, patio covers and other top-supported structures
  • Features 1-in standoff to help prevent rot at post end
  • Slotted for adjustability
  • Designed for versatility, cost-effectiveness and maximum uplift performance
  • Nominal post size: 6x6
  • Made from 14-Gauge steel
  • Z-MAX galvanization offers extra corrosion resistance for exterior and treated-wood applications
  • Install with 16d common nails or 10 x 1-1/2 strong-drive SD screws
  • Shop all Simpson Strong-Tie here.
  • Return Policy

Title: 96 in. x 48 in. Oak Basement Column Cover
Body (HTML):
Take some of the work out of remodeling your basement by covering your existing support columns with this Oak 48 in. x 8 ft. Wrap. This economical size will cover multiple columns. Quick and easy to install. A very attractive alternative to the tedious process of building boxes around your unfinished columns. This Wrap has pre-sanded 1/2 in. wide panels of premium red oak bonded to a flexible backing. Bring out the rich natural wood beauty by simply finishing with two coats of polyurethane. Oak Cap & Base trim (sold separately) can be added to complete the look of a classic fluted column.
  • Economical 48 in. W can be cut to cover multiple columns
  • Cut to fit length covers columns up to 8 ft. height
  • Premium red oak veneer on 1/2 in. wide panels for finest appearance
  • Installs quick and easy with construction adhesive (e.g., liquid nails - not included)
  • Can be stained or just use polyurethane to bring out natural wood beauty
  • Choose optional oak cap and base (model 85CB30, 85CB35 or 85CB40)

Title: 3.5 qt. All Purpose Ready-Mixed Joint Compound
Body (HTML):
USG Sheetrock Brand All Purpose Joint Compound is the original, most-trusted conventional weight all purpose, ready-mixed joint compound for all phases of drywall finishing. Use for repairing cracks on drywall and plaster, embedding USG Sheetrock Brand Paper Joint Tape, and applying drywall filling and finishing coats. May also be used for covering fasteners and USG Sheetrock Brand Corner Bead and Trim, skim coating drywall surfaces, and hand-applying simple textures. USG ready-mixed joint compounds are preferred for consistently high-quality work. Superior formulations are premixed to a creamy, smooth consistency and are essentially free of crater-causing air bubbles. They may be used in hand or machine-tool applications and offer excellent slip, bond, and easy workability.
  • Pre-mixed compound for minimal mixing, thinning, and retempering
  • Superior filling and finishing
  • Provides top-quality bond and hard finish surface
  • GREENGUARD Gold certified for low-emitting performance
  • Return Policy
  • California residents

Title: 18 lb. Easy Sand 90 Lightweight Setting-Type Joint Compound
Body (HTML):
USG Sheetrock Brand Easy Sand 90 Joint Compound is a lightweight, setting-type compound with a 90-minute working time. USG setting-type joint compounds provide faster finishing of drywall interiors, even under slow drying conditions. Rapid chemical hardening and low shrinkage permit same-day finishing and usually next-day decoration. USG Sheetrock Brand Easy Sand 90 Joint Compound features an exceptional bond; virtually unaffected by humidity extremes. It is ideal for laminating double-layer systems, particularly fire-rated assemblies, and for adhering gypsum panels to above-grade concrete surfaces. May also be used for surface texturing and for filling, smoothing and finishing interior above-grade concrete. Note: Setting-type joint compounds should not be used for skim coating due to dryout concerns.
  • Weigh up to 25% less than conventional weight setting-type joint compounds
  • Sands easily; similar to a ready-mixed, all-purpose joint compound
  • Unique humidity resistance
  • Check-crack resistance in heavy ﬁlls
  • For interior gypsum panels and exterior gypsum ceiling boards
  • Return Policy
  • California residents

Title: 60 lbs. Concrete Mix
Body (HTML):
Rapid Set Concrete Mix is a workable, fast setting, high quality concrete repair and concrete restoration material that is ideal where fast strength gain, high durability and low shrinkage are desired. Use Concrete Mix for repair and construction of pavements, sidewalks and steps, formed work, footings, setting posts, industrial floors, machine bases, concrete countertops and concrete repair. Concrete Mix sets in 15-minutes and is ready for traffic in 1-hour. Durable in wet environments, it can be applied from 2 in. to 24 in. thick. Concrete Mix is a high performance blend of Rapid Set hydraulic cement and quality aggregates. It is non-metallic and no chlorides are added. Concrete Mix is similar in appearance to Portland cement concrete and may be applied using similar methods.
  • Fast setting - hardens to structural strength in 1-hour
  • Formulated for long life in critical applications
  • Crack resistant, low-shrink, long life formula
  • Bonds to concrete, brick, stone and many other surfaces
  • High performance, eco-friendly hydraulic cement formulation
  • Easy to use - just add water
  • Meets ASTM C928 requirements
  • One 60 lbs. bag yields 0.5 cu. ft.

Title: 39.37 in. x 432 sq. ft. Roll Saturated Felt Underlayment
Body (HTML):
15 Tarah ASTM 4869 TYPE I is an authentic asphalt saturated organic felt underlayment is used as a breathable secondary weather resistant barrier when applied over the roof deck prior to the installation of the primary roofing product. Organic dry felt is made from 100% post consumer recycled material. Recommended for use with roofing systems when ASTM D 226 is not required. No special fasteners required. Note: Plastic cap nails help seal around nail holes. Superior asphalt saturation means improved waterproofing for your roof deck, accurate bright yellow lay lines allow for easier and more consistent shingle application. Tarah organic felt is made with 100% recycled fiber from OCC (old corrugated cardboard).
  • Tarah Asphalt Products a better-quality roof deck protection often referred as underlayment or felt
  • Tarah manufactures asphalt saturated organic felt to be used as an underlayment for various roof applications
  • Superior asphalt saturation means improved waterproofing for your roof deck, accurate bright yellow lay lines allow for easier and more consistent shingle application
  • Tarah organic felt is made with 100% recycled fiber from OCC (old corrugated cardboard)

Title: Glidesafe 28 ft. Fiberglass Extension Ladder (27 ft. Reach Height) with 300 lb. Load Capacity Type IA Duty Rating
Body (HTML):
The T6228-2GS GLIDESAFE Fiberglass Extension Ladder was built with safety in mind. Featuring lift Assist technology which makes it up to 50% easier to extend versus a traditional extension ladder, helping to create a safer working environment. Built-in lowering assist helps to ensure a smooth, easy descent and helps to prevent potential injuries. GLIDESAFE features a dual locking system to help prevent ladder extension during transport. Non-conductive rails makes this ladder ideal for working near electricity. With a duty rating of 300 lbs., the ladder is durable and long-lasting. The exclusive Alflo rung joint means Twist-Proof performance on the job. The Traction-Tred D rungs are slip-resistant and the side rails are interlocking. The dual action feet are for use on hard or penetrable surfaces and swivel easily. The durable rail shield bracket and shoe help protect the bottom of the rail. The fly section rails are pre-pierced at the top for easy field installation of accessories.
  • Easy operating extension ladder
  • Up to 50% easier to raise versus a traditional extension ladder
  • Speed control lowering, less effort with built-in safety protection
  • Auto lock and transportation latch keep the fly section secured to the base
  • Exclusive alflo rung joint means twist-proof performance
  • Fiberglass construction offers safety around electricity
  • 300 lbs. duty rating for ample support
  • Slip-resistant, traction-tred rungs provide secure footing as you climb or stand on ladder
  • Pre-pierced holes for easy field installation of accessories
  • Combination rail shield bracket and shoe feature SHU-LOK and slip-resistant pad for stability
  • Molded rung braces on bottom step for increased durability
  • Mar-resistant molded end caps help protect walls and ladder
  • Weather resistant for outdoor use
  • OSHA compliant for safety
  • Return Policy
